title: JSON Viewer
description: A component that provides a visual representation of JSON data with collapsible sections, syntax highlighting, and support for nested objects and arrays. It automatically formats and displays JSON data in a tree-like structure with proper indentation and color coding.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: How to use ax-json-viewer in your template.

sections.title: Dynamic
sections.description: Bind to dynamic data and update in real-time.

sections.title: Nested
sections.description: Visualize deeply nested objects and arrays.

types.title: JsonViewerComponent
types.description: The main component for displaying JSON data in a tree-like structure

props.name: json
props.description: The JSON data to be displayed
